Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This gate is locked tightly. Is it[n]used by the school administrators?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}In any case, I should use the[n]front entrance to leave instead...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2150 0 0}Hey, I don't think we're allowed to use that gate.[n]{f 1 1}
